message:
chore(beads): close bd-1s3c0 non-stealable local queue + theft prevention

All acceptance criteria verified:
- Local tasks never enter stealable ready/timed lanes
- try_steal cannot return a local task
- 10 tests demonstrate local tasks stay on owner worker under steal pressure
